# KovaFit

> KovaFit is a strength-training workout tracker for lifters, available free on the iOS App Store (Android coming soon). It focuses on fast set logging, automatic personal-record (PR) detection, training streaks, progress stats, and a lightweight social feed with no ads and no algorithm.

## Key features
- Two-tap set logging (weight, reps) with smart weight suggestions and a built-in rest timer
- Inline muscle map showing which muscles each exercise hits
- Automatic personal-record detection and estimated one-rep-max (1RM) per exercise
- Progress stats: performance trends, lifetime volume, top lifts, and muscle-split breakdown
- Training streaks and a full-year consistency heatmap
- Social feed to follow friends, cheer PRs, and comment — no ads, no algorithm
- Shareable workout cards (stat overlay or your own photo)
- Sign in with Apple, Google, or GitHub; secure cloud sync
- Export your full training history and delete your account instantly

## Platform & pricing
- iOS: free on the App Store — https://apps.apple.com/ca/app/kova-workout-tracker-gym-log/id6780379828
- Android: coming soon

## Pages
- Home: https://kovafit.ca/
- Support & FAQ: https://kovafit.ca/support/
- Privacy Policy: https://kovafit.ca/privacy/
- Terms of Use: https://kovafit.ca/terms/

## Free tools & guides
- Lifting tools hub: https://kovafit.ca/tools/
- One-Rep Max (1RM) Calculator — estimate your 1RM from any set, with a rep-max chart: https://kovafit.ca/tools/one-rep-max-calculator/
- Barbell Plate Calculator — which plates to load per side: https://kovafit.ca/tools/plate-calculator/
- Blog: https://kovafit.ca/blog/
- Guide: How to calculate your one-rep max: https://kovafit.ca/blog/how-to-calculate-one-rep-max/
